title: When Is a Measurement RG-Relevant?
excerpt: A step-by-step guide to the R to 1 replica trick, the measurement Harris criterion, and the 2D Ising spin and energy examples.

title: Rokhsar-Kivelson States, Noisy Ising Measurements, and Mixedness
excerpt: A detailed Ising note deriving the RK wavefunction, the Bayesian posterior under noisy bond measurements, the exact outcome-averaged mixed state, and the first-moment identity.

title: Basics of Replica Theory
excerpt: From quenched disorder to Bayesian conditioning, with replica limits, Nishimori-line symmetries, and gauge interpretations.
